source_domain_specifics: characteristic function exp(iμt − γ^α|t|^α(1−iβ sgn(t) tan(πα/2)))
framing_text: Lévy α-stable distributions generalize the Gaussian (α=2) to fat-tail family (0<α≤2). The α index governs tail behavior: α<2 produces infinite-variance heavy tails. Estimating α from empirical samples uses MLE on the characteristic-function fit.
